articles.title: Nvidia Stock Forecast: Could NVDA Stock Rise To $300 in 2026?
articles.content:
### New on Yahoo [...] ### [...] ## Why NVDA Stock Fell After a Blowout Earnings Report

While the reaction to Nvidia’s earnings wasn’t what one would expect after such a blowout quarter, there are reasons why markets reacted that way. Firstly, the bar is always set high for Nvidia, and markets expect more than a mere earnings beat from the world’s biggest company.

Also, while the fiscal Q1 guide was impressive and surpassed estimates, it wasn’t totally unexpected considering the spending spree

articles.title: Nvidia (NVDA) Stock Predictions for 2026 and Beyond | The Motley Fool
articles.content:
Other signs indicate a strong 2026, as well. Data center capital expenditures continue to rise among other hyperscalers and start-ups, and AI is starting to drive real business at the software level, not only for start-ups like OpenAI and Anthropic but also for established cloud software companies that are leveraging AI models in their own businesses.

articles.title: NVIDIA Stock Forecast 2026–2030 | Future Outlook - Capital.com
articles.content:
## NVDA stock price: Technical overview

The NVDA stock price is trading near $188.52 as of 9:57am UTC on 18 February 2026, with price holding above the Classic pivot at 187.74 and oscillating around a medium-term moving-average band. On the daily chart, the simple 20/50/100/200-day moving averages cluster around 185 / 185 / 186 / 172, suggesting a broadly supportive longer-term base, while shorter-term signals remain mixed. # Prediction: This Will Be Nvidia's Stock Price by the End of 2026

Nvidia's stock could move significantly higher by the end of the year.

## Key Points

It's crystal clear that Nvidia (NVDA +4.30%) has been one of the primary beneficiaries of the scramble to adopt artificial intelligence (AI).
